response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack engineering expertise, distributed systems knowledge, and some exposure to agentic workflows through MCP tools and developer tooling. However, there is no explicit evidence of production-scale multi-agent AI systems, fintech infrastructure experience, or regulatory compliance in high-stakes environments. His background leans more toward general software craftsmanship and geospatial systems rather than the specialized agentic-AI fintech domain.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems and backend engineering experience with event-driven architectures
Proven leadership in scaling engineering teams and developing technical leadership
Hands-on experience with AI-agent tooling and developer infrastructure (MCP, code generators)
concerns: No demonstrated production experience with multi-agent AI systems in commercial or regulated environments
Limited fintech-specific background (credit systems, payment flows, embedded finance)
Lacks evidence of architectural depth in real-time inference, streaming data, or model-agnostic AI systems
